label: String rule
description: A grammar rule that produces a fixed or translated output string. Most string rules are expressed as rulesStrings entries rather than raw Rule_String objects.

output.label: Output
output.description: The text this rule produces when selected. May contain grammar references in [keyword] form.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight. Higher values make this rule more likely to be chosen.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Selection priority. Rules with higher priority are always preferred over lower-priority rules.
